title: New Student from Another Dimension
overview: Okumura may not be interested in 3D girls, but he's surprised when he discovers that he and Ririsa share similar passions.

title: Cosplay Group Potential?
overview: Mikari is a new student at school and all the boys are crazy for her since she's a model. She also happens to be Okumura's childhood friend.

title: Lili x Miri
overview: Mikari doesn't get why Okumura and Ririsa love cosplay, but she's willing to give it a shot if it means winning the heart of the boy she loves.

title: Time for Our First Event!
overview: Okumura and Ririsa head to their first cosplay event, but all they can think about is how much this feels like a date!

title: First Event Is Over!!
overview: Ririsa dazzles the entire venue with her amazing Lilliel cosplay, but now she and Okumura need to handle her newfound popularity.

title: Tips From a Master
overview: There’s a special bond between cosplayers and photographers, one that Mikari can’t help but be jealous of.

title: We Need an Advisor!
overview: The Manga Club needs an advisor or else Okumura and Ririsa will lose their club-room! The new teacher could help, especially since she seems very familiar.

title: Do You Love Cosplay?
overview: Okumura and Ririsa don't want to hide their activities from the school and decide to participate in an upcoming cosplay event as an official club activity.

title: You're Not Liliel!
overview: Nagomi is the star of the event, and her words shook Ririsa to her very core. Now it's up to Okumura, Mayuri and the others to restore her confidence.

title: Mayura vs. Nagomi!!
overview: The legendary Mayura has returned, and now two Queens of Cosplay square off during the photo-shoot.

title: My Enchanted Armor
overview: Nagomi realizes she can just have fun with cosplay, just like Ririsa. When the two cos-players meet later on, a new friendship blooms.

title: Five Rising Stars
overview: The good news is that the Manga Club can keep the club room! The bad news is that their cosplay activities must remain a secret.

title: Can We Be Friends?
overview: Nonoa wishes to befriend Ririsa, but the rising star of the cosplay world has a big problem: her social skills are non-existent.

title: Together with You
overview: Okumura and Nonoa have a heart-to-heart. Perhaps it will give the shy cos-player the courage to clear up the misunderstanding between her and Ririsa.

title: I'll Keep Evolving
overview: Ririsa and Nonoa have cleared up their misunderstanding and are now friends. While memories of her middle school experiences linger, Nonoa is determined to move forward.

title: Your Way, My Way
overview: Aria certainly has potential, but her costume seriously lacks substance. Now, it’s up to the Manga Club to give her a crash course in cosplay and all things otaku!

title: Comrades in (Cosplay) Arms
overview: Aria confides in the Manga Club about her estranged father and her passion for cosplay. Touched by her story, the club members vow to help Aria accomplish her dream.

title: Destiny
overview: The Manga Club rallies around a devastated Aria after she breaks the news. Fortunately, Okumura can't help but feel there's more to the story than what Aria overheard.

title: Time for Summer Comiket!
overview: The Manga Club arrive at Summer Comiket and are determined to give their cosplay their all. Unfortunately, cos-playing as a group is harder than it looks.

title: The World We Create with Our Friends
overview: Coordination isn’t their only problem. The Manga Club must also deal with the bane of cosplayers everywhere: heat.

title: The Protagonist's Story
overview: Ten years is a long time to dwell on guilt. An estranged father’s regrets, and a determined daughter’s wish are about to arrive at a crossroads.

title: This Wonderful World
overview: Okumura and Ririsa happen to be alone together for once, but that doesn’t mean it’s now a date, right?

title: Manga Club On the Beach
overview: Okumura realizes he needs to understand his friends more, and what better place to do so than at the beach?

title: 2.5-Dimensional Ririsa
overview: Love is messy and doesn’t work in real life like it does in anime. When Okumura overhears a heartfelt conversation, he worries what it means for the future.
